summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Enhanced Creator Dashboard features. All core features working: Upload flow dialog (3-step), file validation (PNG/size/transparency), product preview grid with 5 product types, toggle switches, color selectors, embroidery auto-disable for gradient designs, design submission with product_configs, and Products View panel. Backend APIs 11/11 passed, Frontend UI all features functional.

issues: Mockup images are stock photos from Unsplash, not actual product mockups with design overlays - design is overlaid via CSS which works but is simplified

critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper data-testid attributes
Design validation logic correctly checks PNG format, dimensions, transparency
Embroidery products auto-disabled based on color count analysis works correctly
Product configs correctly stored in database with print_metadata
All 5 product types (tshirt, hoodie, oversized_tshirt, varsity_jacket, cap) supported
seed_data_creation: 1 test design ('Test Design 1') with 2 products (tshirt, hoodie) in submitted status
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard upload flow fully tested. Creator test user has 1 design in 'submitted' status. Printify integration is MOCKED. Test session token for creator: test_creator_session_1771988899501

upload_dialog_opens.details: Upload Design button opens 3-step dialog correctly

file_validation_non_png.details: Shows error 'Please upload a PNG file. Other formats are not supported.'

file_validation_dimensions.details: Shows error for images below 4500×5400px minimum requirement

file_validation_transparency.details: Shows error 'Design must have a transparent background.'

product_preview_grid.details: Shows all 5 product types: T-Shirt, Hoodie, Oversized T-Shirt, Varsity Jacket, Cap

product_toggles.details: Enable/disable toggle switches work for each product

color_selector.details: Color picker expands and allows selecting different garment colors

embroidery_auto_disable.details: Varsity Jacket and Cap auto-disabled with 'Too many colors for embroidery' message for gradient/multicolor designs

design_details_step.details: Step 3 shows design preview, enabled products, title/description inputs, and submission info

design_submission.details: Submit creates design with product_configs, design_analysis, and print_metadata

dashboard_status_grouping.details: Designs grouped by status: Under Review (2), Live, Drafts, Rejected sections

products_view_panel.details: Slide-out panel shows design info, product mockups with prices, and review status

design_card_product_count.details: Design cards show '2 products', '3 products' badges correctly

mocked_integrations: Printify API - all functions in printify_service.py are placeholders
